rationale: Budget v8 — recalibrated to the new ACTUAL floor (144) after the 2026-06-09 honest-clean pass: real bugs fixed (companion feed, command-injection, 29 N+1 loops) + 4 detectors sharpened conservatively (env-config-drift public-API-host allowlist 299→9, a11y 481+38 fixed, fake-data domain-term allowlist, resource-leak bounded-SQL exemption — each verified to still fire on real cases via their own contract tests). The v7 maxTotal=1131 was ~8x stale. The budget gate (total > maxTotal*1.05 ≈ 168) now fails a real spike; the ratchet separately fails ANY new high/critical. Remaining are genuine debt: ~20 perf_sync_fs (need async refactor), 13 dead-event-listener (documented imperative consumers a static detector can't see), 9 placeholder URLs, 8 multiline a11y buttons.
